name: Clayton County International Park Tennis Center
description: Clayton County International Park Tennis Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Jonesboro, GA. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights, restrooms, water, and a pro shop or equipment store. A one-time fee is required to play. Reservations are available.

name: Flat Shoals Park
description: Flat Shoals Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Riverdale, GA. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Flint River Community Center
description: Flint River Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Riverdale, GA. There are 3 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include locker rooms, restrooms, water, and youth programming.

name: Harvest Village Pickleball
description: Stay active year-round! Our indoor pickleball courts provide a comfortable and convenient way to play, no matter the season. Keep your skills sharp and your body moving.

name: Independence Park
description: Come play pickleball at Independence Park in Jonesboro, GA! There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to lights and restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Lovejoy Tennis Complex
description: Come play pickleball at Lovejoy Tennis Complex in Hampton, GA! There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights and restrooms. The courts are free.

name: McBrayer Park
description: Come play pickleball at McBrayer Park in Hampton, GA! There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.

name: The ROC Gym, First Baptist Jonesboro
description: The ROC Gym, First Baptist Jonesboro is a place to play pickleball in Jonesboro, GA. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, lights, wheelchair accessibility, and locker rooms. The courts are free.

name: Virginia Burton Gray Recreation Center
description: Virginia Burton Gray Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Riverdale, GA. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play.
